name: Wood 4 Slot Cutting Board Pan Lid Organizer Yellow - Brightroom™
description:
Help keep your counter space clutter free with this Wooden 4-Slot Cutting Board Pan Lid Organizer from Brightroom™. Supported on a flat, rectangular base, this wooden lid organizer features four fixed slots to store skillets, pan lids, cutting or chopping boards, baking trays and more. Featuring a natural bamboo finish, it's sure to add farmhouse-style charm to your kitchen decor.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
